issue.title: _join_url does not validate host allowing SSRF via env vars and builder payload
issue.actual_behavior: _join_url() in direct_provider.py (lines 321-322) just concatenates base_url and suffix without any host validation. An attacker who controls base_url (via SPARK_INTELLIGENCE_PROVIDER_BASE_URL env var or builder provider payload) can redirect API requests with Authorization: Bearer to internal services (e.g. http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/ or http://internal-service:8080/).
issue.expected_behavior: _join_url() should validate that the host in base_url is in an allowlist of known-safe provider hosts, rejecting any attempt to redirect API requests to internal or attacker-controlled URLs.
repro_steps: Note _join_url() does plain string concatenation with no host validation
Note base_url can come from SPARK_INTELLIGENCE_PROVIDER_BASE_URL env var or builder provider payload
Observe _join_url succeeds and the server sends Authorization header to the metadata endpoint
issue.affected_workflow: All direct provider API requests (chat_completions and anthropic_messages) leak API keys to attacker-controlled hosts via SSRF

evidence.before_after_proof: BEFORE: _join_url() at lines 321-322 does plain string concatenation. Any host including 169.254.169.254 or internal-service passes without validation. AFTER: ALLOWED_PROVIDER_HOSTS frozenset is defined at module level containing api.anthropic.com, api.groq.com, api.minimax.io, api.openai.com, api.together.xyz, api.z.ai, localhost, 127.0.0.1, ::1. _validate_provider_base_url() extracts hostname via urlparse and raises RuntimeError if host not in allowlist. _join_url() calls _validate_provider_base_url() before concatenation.

proposed_fix.approach: Add ALLOWED_PROVIDER_HOSTS frozenset allowlist at module level containing known safe provider hosts. Add _validate_provider_base_url() function that parses the URL via urlparse and rejects any host not in the allowlist. Modify _join_url() to call _validate_provider_base_url() before concatenation.
proposed_fix.tests_or_smoke: All 10 tests pass (8 subtests). Added test_join_url_rejects_hosts_not_in_allowlist (parametrized: 169.254.169.254, internal-service:8080, evil.attacker.com, metadata.google.internal, 10.0.0.1:8080). Added test_join_url_accepts_allowed_hosts (api.openai.com, api.anthropic.com, api.minimax.io). Added test_join_url_rejects_empty_or_missing_host (empty string, invalid URL). Added test_allowed_provider_hosts_is_frozen (frozenset immutability).

review_claim.duplicate_notes: Searched open PRs and issues in vibeforge1111/spark-intelligence-builder for ALLOWED_PROVIDER_HOSTS, host allowlist, SSRF, or _join_url host validation. No prior fix exists for this SSRF vulnerability.
review_claim.risk_notes: Low risk change. _join_url() is called at 2 locations (line 196 for chat_completions, line 233 for anthropic_messages via _normalize_anthropic_base_url). The ALLOWED_PROVIDER_HOSTS frozenset contains the 6 known production API hosts plus 3 loopback addresses for local development. If a new provider needs to be added, the frozenset is defined at module level and easy to extend. The pattern matches existing SSRF protection in spark-character and spark-voice-comms.
